title: Santo André, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Santo André is a city in SP with a population of 723,889. An industrial and commercial hub in Greater São Paulo, known for its parks, cultural centers, and the historic Paranapiacaba village.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
